ddls:
CREATE TABLE "matches" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the match was played */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the home team */,
  "opp_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the opposing team */,
  "venue_id" INTEGER /* ID of the venue where the match was played */,
  "tm_pts" INTEGER /* Points scored by the home team */,
  "op_pts" INTEGER /* Points scored by the opposing team */,
  "outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the match (e.g., win, loss, draw) */,
  "time" TEXT /* Exact time the match was played */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of spectators at the match */,
  "referee" TEXT /* Name of the referee */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the match */,
  "home_team_score_1st_half" INTEGER /* Score of the home team in the first half */,
  "away_team_score_1st_half" INTEGER /* Score of the away team in the first half */,
  "home_team_score_2nd_half" INTEGER /* Score of the home team in the second half */,
  "away_team_score_2nd_half" INTEGER /* Score of the away team in the second half */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_opp_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("opp_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_venue_id FOREIGN KEY ("venue_id") REFERENCES venues ("venue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "division" TEXT /* Division the team belongs to */,
  "conference" TEXT /* Conference the team belongs to */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "stadium" TEXT /* Name of the team's home stadium */,
  "team_colors" TEXT /* Team's colors */,
  "manager_name" TEXT /* Name of the team's manager */,
  "website" TEXT /* Team's official website */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "venues" (
  "venue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each venue */,
  "venue_name" TEXT /* Name of the venue */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the venue */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Seating capacity of the venue */,
  "surface_type" TEXT /* Type of surface (e.g., grass, artificial turf) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("venue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leagues" (
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each league */,
  "league_name" TEXT /* Name of the league */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season the league is being played in */,
  "sport" TEXT /* Type of sport (e.g., football, rugby) */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the league is based */,
  "number_of_teams" INTEGER /* Number of teams in the league */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team statistic */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the statistic is for */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Number of wins */,
  "losses" INTEGER /* Number of losses */,
  "draws" INTEGER /* Number of draws */,
  "pts_for" INTEGER /* Total points scored */,
  "pts_against" INTEGER /* Total points conceded */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Total points earned by the team */,
  "goals_scored" INTEGER /* Total goals scored by the team */,
  "goals_conceded" INTEGER /* Total goals conceded by the team */,
  "clean_sheets" INTEGER /* Number of matches where the team did not concede any goals */,
  "yellow_cards" INTEGER /* Total number of yellow cards received by the team */,
  "red_cards" INTEGER /* Total number of red cards received by the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_stats_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player statistic */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the statistic is for */,
  "games_played" INTEGER /* Number of games played */,
  "goals" INTEGER /* Number of goals scored */,
  "behinds" INTEGER /* Number of behinds scored */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Number of assists made by the player */,
  "yellow_cards" INTEGER /* Number of yellow cards received by the player */,
  "red_cards" INTEGER /* Number of red cards received by the player */,
  "minutes_played" INTEGER /* Total minutes played by the player */,
  "injuries" INTEGER /* Number of injuries sustained by the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position the player plays */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  "height" INTEGER /* Height of the player in centimeters */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the player in kilograms */,
  "preferred_foot" TEXT /* Preferred foot (e.g., left, right) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, analyst, coach) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login time of the user */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the system was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., login, logout, query) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the system */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
